domainAccess.bodyNamed: {{email}} is not a member of “{{projectName}}”. Ask a project admin for an invite, then sign in again.
domainAccess.bodyUnnamed: {{email}} is not a member of this project. Ask a project admin for an invite, then sign in again.

noProject.subtitle: Create your first project to get started.

errors.invalidName: Project name must contain at least one letter or number.

errors.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters

sso.intro: Identities from your identity provider that are linked to this account. Linking an SSO identity lets you sign in without a password.

licenseGate.requiresLicense: This feature requires an Innolope CMS {{plan}} license.
licenseGate.proUnlocks: Unlock AI writing, the media library, webhooks, and multiple projects support.
licenseGate.enterpriseUnlocks: Unlock SSO, audit logs, custom roles, and more.

versions.revertMessage: Revert to version {{version}}? Current content will be saved as a new version.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.emptyLine1: Select text in a field and use quick actions,

settings.noModels: No models available — connect a provider below
settings.cloudIntro: AI providers are managed by Innolope Cloud. All major models are available. Select your preferred default model above.
settings.providerApiKeysHelp: Add your own API keys to enable AI features. Keys are stored encrypted per project. You can add the same provider multiple times to rotate between API keys; rows are tried top-to-bottom.
settings.removeProviderConnectedMessage: This removes this {{provider}} key. The stored API key is deleted when you save.
settings.fallbackTitle: Fall back to other providers on rate limit or error
settings.fallbackHelp: If the selected model's provider returns a 429 or 5xx, try the next enabled provider in the list (using that provider's default model).

unsplash.upgradeDescription: This feature requires an Innolope CMS Pro license. Unlock AI writing, webhooks, and multiple projects support.

relationField.relatedNotImported: Related collection "{{name}}" is not imported — showing the raw reference id.
relationField.noRelatedCollection: No related collection detected for this field.

analytics.contentGapsDesc: Queries with more misses than hits — consider creating content for these topics.

collectionAccess.fullAccessNote: Full access (this role grants access to all collections).
collectionAccess.linkedTooltip: Auto-readable via relations — only grant if the user must edit it directly.
collectionAccess.noCollections: No collections in this project yet.
collectionAccess.linkedHelp: Linked collections (used as relation targets) are readable automatically through relations — grant them only if the user should be able to manage records directly.

customDomain.removeConfirmMessage: Remove this custom domain? The CMS will no longer be reachable there.
customDomain.intro1: Link your own domain so your team signs in to this project at a branded URL (e.g.
customDomain.intro2: ). The domain is tied to this project — anyone visiting it lands directly on this project's sign-in.
customDomain.step1Desc: Add this TXT record at your DNS provider to prove you own the domain.
customDomain.step2Desc1: Add a CNAME record so the domain resolves to the CMS. An HTTPS certificate is issued automatically on the first visit. If your DNS is on Cloudflare, set this record to
customDomain.step2Desc2: (grey cloud) — a proxied record blocks certificate issuance.
customDomain.signInAt: Your team can now sign in to this project at
customDomain.cnameReminder1: Make sure the CNAME record for
customDomain.cnameReminder3: . If your DNS is on Cloudflare, keep this record

general.slugHelp: Used in URLs and API. Changing this may break existing integrations.
general.localesHelp: Languages this content can be authored in.
general.deleteWorkspaceDesc: Permanently removes the workspace and its CMS content. Your external database and its data are not touched.
general.deleteWorkspacePrompt2: and all of its CMS content, collections, and members. This cannot be undone. Your connected external database and its data will not be deleted.

license.removeConfirmMessage: Remove this license and revert to the Community tier?
license.removedToast: License removed. Now running on the Community tier.
license.cloudNotice: This instance runs on Innolope Cloud — all features are included and no license key is needed.
license.communityNotice: You're on the free Community tier. Activate a license key below to unlock Pro and Enterprise features.
license.activateDesc: Paste the license key from your Innolope CMS purchase. Keys start with

media.cfEnvConfiguredDesc: All required Cloudflare credentials are set as environment variables on the server. No additional configuration is needed.
media.localDesc: Files stored on the server filesystem. Good for development and small deployments.

sso.deleteConfirmMessage: This permanently deletes the SSO connection. This cannot be undone.
sso.intro: Configure SAML or OIDC single sign-on for your team. Users whose email domain matches an enabled connection can sign in via their identity provider.
sso.empty: No SSO connections yet. Add one to start federating logins with your IdP.

fields.clientSecretExisting: Client secret (leave blank to keep current)
fields.idpCerts: IdP certificates (PEM, one block per cert — add a second during rotation)
fields.groupRoleMap: Group → role map (one mapping per line: GROUP_NAME=role)

flags.enforceSso: Enforce SSO (block password login for matching domains)

sso.addSecondCertWarning: Add a second cert before rotation to avoid downtime.

scim.title: SCIM provisioning tokens
scim.description: Generate a bearer token for your IdP's SCIM client. Tokens can create and deactivate users, but cannot view secrets or change SSO configuration.
scim.saveTokenNotice: Save this token now. It will not be shown again.
scim.revokeConfirmMessage: Revoke this SCIM token? Active syncs using it will start failing.

webhook.intro: Receive HTTP callbacks when content changes occur
webhook.secretReveal: Webhook secret (copy now — shown only once):
webhook.emptyDesc: Webhooks notify external services in real time when content is created, updated, published, or deleted.

database.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one collection to display
database.adapterPromotedToast: Also using Cloudflare Images for new uploads.

instructions.0: Open MongoDB Atlas and select your cluster
instructions.2: Copy the connection string and replace <password> with your database user password

instructions.0: Find the connection details in your PostgreSQL hosting dashboard
instructions.1: Combine host, port, user, password, and database name into the URI format
instructions.2: If SSL is required, append ?sslmode=require to the string

instructions.0: Find the connection details in your MySQL hosting dashboard or server config
instructions.1: Combine host, port, user, password, and database name into the URI format
instructions.2: Default port is 3306 unless configured otherwise
Scroll to "Connection string" section and select URI
instructions.3: Copy the string and replace [YOUR-PASSWORD] with your database password

instructions.2: Choose "General connection string" and copy it
instructions.3: Replace the password placeholder with your SQL user password

instructions.0: Open the Firebase Console and select your project
instructions.1: Go to Project Settings → Service accounts
instructions.2: Click "Generate new private key" to download the JSON file
instructions.3: Open the file and paste the entire JSON content below

instructions.1: The connection string is displayed on the main Dashboard page
instructions.2: Click the copy button next to "Connection Details"

instructions.0: Open the Vercel dashboard and go to Storage
instructions.3: Copy the value of POSTGRES_URL (not POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING)

database.resyncDesc: Re-scan the database to refresh field types (dates, relations) and pull in newly-related collections.
database.noCollectionsFound: No collections found in this database.
database.referencesAutoImport: References {{target}} — it will be imported automatically
database.builtInDesc: Content stored in the default Innolope CMS database. No external connection needed.
database.howToFind: How to find your connection string
database.foundDatabases_one: We found {{count}} database on this server. Choose which one to connect.
database.foundDatabases_other: We found {{count}} databases on this server. Choose which one to connect.
database.detectedCollectionsLabel: Detected collections — select which to manage as CMS collections
database.detectedTablesLabel: Detected tables — select which to manage as CMS collections
database.noCollectionsInDb: No collections found in this database.
database.noTablesInDb: No tables found in this database.
database.tooLargeToCache: — too large to cache automatically; records are read live from the database until you sync
database.mediaWhereTitle: Where are your media files stored?
database.mediaWhereDesc_one: We detected {{count}} media library. Tell us where the files live so the CMS can build working URLs from the stored paths.
database.mediaWhereDesc_other: We detected {{count}} media libraries. Tell us where the files live so the CMS can build working URLs from the stored paths.

public.label: Public URL
public.desc: Files load directly by their URL — no credentials needed.

r2.label: Cloudflare R2
r2.desc: Private bucket — the CMS signs short-lived URLs.

cloudflareImages.label: Cloudflare Images
cloudflareImages.desc: Private images — the CMS signs delivery URLs.

probe.checking: Checking where these files are stored…
probe.public: We checked a sample of files — they load publicly. Nothing else to configure.
probe.privateWithProvider: These files are private — they look like {{provider}}. Enter its credentials below.
probe.privateGeneric: These files are private. Pick the host below and enter its credentials.
probe.needBaseUrl: These files are stored as relative paths — tell us how they are served below.
probe.errorGeneric: We couldn't check automatically. Choose where these files are stored below.
probe.errorWithDetail: We couldn't check automatically ({{detail}}). Choose where these files are stored below.

database.baseUrlHelp: Leave blank if the stored paths are already full URLs.

creds.serverSideNote: Stored server-side and never sent back to the browser.

database.importedMediaDescription_one: We check where the files for your imported media library are stored and show what we found below — confirm the host, and add credentials if they're private.
database.importedMediaDescription_other: We check where the files for your imported media libraries are stored and show what we found below — confirm the host, and add credentials if they're private.

subtitle.setup: Welcome! Set up your Innolope CMS account to get started.
subtitle.signIn: Sign in to your Innolope CMS account

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

acceptInvite.createAccountToJoin: Create an account with {{email}} to join.

onboarding.intro: Your account is ready. Let's take a quick look at what you can do — and activate a license if you have one.
onboarding.chooseSubtitle: Innolope CMS is fully functional for free. Pro and Enterprise unlock more.
onboarding.activateSubtitle: Have a Pro or Enterprise key? Paste it below to unlock paid features. You can always do this later from Settings.

errors.pasteOrSkip: Paste your license key, or skip for now.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.customizeDescription: Select which data points to show on your dashboard.
dashboard.statsError: Couldn't load dashboard statistics. Check your connection and reload the page.

steps.generateApiKeyTail: for Claude or other AI agents

empty.welcomeSubtitle: How would you like to add your first content?
empty.importComingSoon: File import is coming soon. For now, use the MCP server or API to bulk-create content.

connectDb.title: Connect Database

uploadFiles.title: Upload Files
uploadFiles.desc: I have content in Markdown or JSON files

upload.intro: Upload Markdown (.md) or JSON (.json) files to import content.
upload.dropHint: Drop .md, .json, or .jsonl files here or click to browse

list.liveDataNote: Showing live data from the external database — this collection is too large to cache automatically. Search, filtering, sorting, and editing require syncing the collection first.

reject.title: Reject content
reject.message: Add an optional reason for rejecting this content.

syncDialog.title: External changes found
syncDialog.intro: Sync will overwrite the local CMS cache with the external database values. A copy of each overwritten local version will be saved in version history.

import.progress: Importing content from the external database — {{processed}} of {{total}} records cached. The full collection is browsable now; search, filtering, and editing become available once the import finishes.
import.progressUnknownTotal: Importing content from the external database — {{processed}} records cached. The full collection is browsable now; search, filtering, and editing become available once the import finishes.
import.failed: Content import did not finish. Some records may be missing — re-run the import from the database settings, or use Sync.
import.failedWithError: Content import did not finish: {{error}}. Some records may be missing — re-run the import from the database settings, or use Sync.

new.title: New Collection
new.subtitle: How would you like to define your collection?
new.builtinDbNote: Content will be stored in the built-in Innolope CMS database.

importFile.title: Import from File
importFile.subtitle: Upload a CSV or JSON file to auto-detect fields.
importFile.dropHint: Drop .csv, .json, .yaml, or .md files here or click to browse

importPaste.title: Import with Paste
importPaste.subtitle: Paste data to auto-detect collection fields.
importPaste.jsonHint: Object keys become field names. Types are inferred from values. Arrays of objects are also supported.
importPaste.csvHint: First row is used as headers. Column types are inferred from data values.
importPaste.yamlHint: Each key: value pair becomes a field. Also supports frontmatter (--- delimited).

aiGenerate.title: AI Generate
aiGenerate.subtitle: Describe your collection and we'll create the schema.
aiGenerate.promptLabel: Describe your collection and the fields it should have
aiGenerate.promptPlaceholder: e.g. A product catalog with name, price, SKU, category, description, stock count, and whether it's featured
aiGenerate.requiresFeature: AI schema generation requires the AI Assistant feature.
aiGenerate.upgradePrompt: Upgrade to Pro to unlock AI-powered schema creation.

manual.title: Manual Input
manual.subtitle: Define your collection fields one by one.

configure.title: Review & Create
configure.subtitle_one: {{count}} field detected. Review and adjust before creating.
configure.subtitle_other: {{count}} fields detected. Review and adjust before creating.

fieldEditor.title: Fields
fieldEditor.emptyHint: No fields yet. Every collection gets markdown content by default.

errors.aiNoFields: No fields generated. Try a more detailed description.
errors.expectedObjectOrArray: Expected a JSON object or array of objects.
errors.noFieldsYaml: No fields detected. Use key: value format.

detail.readOnlyLive: This is live data from the external database. Sync the collection to cache it locally and enable editing.
detail.readOnlyContent: This content is read-only. The external database connection is configured as read-only.
detail.tagsPlaceholder: Add a tag and press Enter

draftRestore.message: You have unsaved changes from a previous session.

locale.detectedTitle: Detected {{langs}} in this record but not in project settings — click to review

localePrompt.title: Add detected languages?
localePrompt.message_one: This record has content in {{labels}}, but it isn't in your project locales yet. Add it so you can use the locale switcher to edit it? Picking "Not now" hides the switcher and falls back to JSON editing.
localePrompt.message_other: This record has content in {{labels}}, but they aren't in your project locales yet. Add them so you can use the locale switcher to edit them? Picking "Not now" hides the switcher and falls back to JSON editing.

translate.nothingOnRecord: Nothing to translate on this record
translate.replaceMessage: The {{lang}} value for "{{field}}" already has content. Replace it with a new AI translation?
translate.translateMessage: Translate {{what}} from {{source}} to {{target}} with AI? Existing {{target}} values will be replaced.{{saveFirstNote}}
translate.saveFirstNote: Save the record first to also translate the document body.

edit.title: Edit: {{name}}
edit.noFieldsHint: No fields yet. Every collection gets markdown content by default.
edit.sidebarHint: Auto hides collections that another collection references via a relation field, so lookup-only collections (tags, authors, categories) don't clutter the sidebar.
edit.titleFieldHint: Used as the row label in list views and reference pickers. Auto picks title → name → a name-like field → the first text field.

sidebar.auto: Auto (hide when used only as a relation target)

advanced.helpTextHint: Short hint shown below the input
